class Connection:
    def __init__(self):
        self._connected = False
        self._data = None

    def connect(self):
        self._connected = True

    def send(self, data):
        if not self._connected:
            raise RuntimeError("Not connected")
        self._data = data

    def recv(self):
        if not self._connected:
            raise RuntimeError("Not connected")
        return self._data


class Builder:
    def __init__(self):
        self._result = None

    def set_name(self, name):
        self._result = {"name": name}
        return self

    def set_value(self, value):
        if self._result is None:
            raise RuntimeError("Call set_name first")
        self._result["value"] = value
        return self

    def build(self):
        if self._result is None:
            raise RuntimeError("Nothing to build")
        return self._result


class Pipeline:
    def __init__(self):
        self._stages = []
        self._executed = False

    def add_stage(self, fn):
        self._stages.append(fn)

    def execute(self, data):
        result = data
        for stage in self._stages:
            result = stage(result)
        self._executed = True
        return result

    def get_result(self):
        if not self._executed:
            raise RuntimeError("Pipeline not executed")
